description_long: This object is a white changing table and dresser combination, featuring three drawers on the left and a single cabinet door on the right. The top surface is fitted with a light yellow, patterned changing pad, bordered by raised side and back panels for safety. The knobs on the drawers and cabinet are small and rounded, matching the overall minimalist design. The structure is rectangular with short legs, and the back panel is solid and unadorned. The side panels are plain, with the raised edges of the changing area visible from above. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and designed for use in a nursery or childcare setting.
description: A white changing table dresser with three drawers, a cabinet, and a raised, padded changing surface on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers, a cabinet door, and the raised changing pad area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the changing pad area and the raised safety panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the changing pad and the raised side panel.
